description.ko: 거대한 공허의 중심부로 떠나는 여정입니다. 신비로운 존재 보이드-3가 끝없는 우주 심연의 어둠 속을 표류하며 별들의 탄생과 죽음을 관조합니다.
description.en: A journey into the heart of the great void, where the mysterious entity VOID-3 drifts through the infinite darkness of the deep cosmos, observing the birth and death of stars.

prompt: Cinematic shot of VOID-3, a massive obsidian monolith floating in the deepest reaches of the cosmos, surrounded by swirling dark matter and bioluminescent indigo nebulae, distant quasars flickering in the dark, hyper-realistic, 8k resolution, ethereal and haunting atmosphere, cosmic horror aesthetic.
